title: hypericum arboreum
intro: Hypericum arboreum, also known as the tutsan or tree St. John's wort, is a flowering evergreen shrub native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory compounds like hyperforin and hypericin. These properties have been associated with various health benefits, such as wound healing, antiviral and antibacterial effects, and potential anti-cancer properties. Hypericum arboreum can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, from skin conditions to respiratory problems.
